title: ずうっと、つやつや、魔法の花

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While doing some research in the library, I hear a
sad voice...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I... can't save you all... I'm so sorry. Not even
flowers are safe from my bad luck...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww... Wahhh! The flowers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Rice Shower is growing flowers, but
the heatwave this year has her worried that they'll
quickly wilt.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
They'd finally bloomed... But then I had to get
involved and screw up the weather!
U-um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for eavesdropping, but there's a
magazine I think you should read.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hm? A special feature about preserved flowers?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, it's a way to keep fresh flowers
looking beautiful for longer.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The colors stay vibrant and the flowers bloom
forever! It's like something from a fairy tale!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...So doing this keeps the flowers beautifully in
bloom?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rob Roy! I'm going to give this a try!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't we go to a flower
preserving class? The back of the magazine
mentions one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the conditions of the class is that
attendees are supervised by an adult, so they ask
me to go along with them.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Before flowers can be preserved, they must be
raised to peak bloom. Then we can begin the
decolorization and dehydration processes in
order to extract the matter that causes wilting.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Today, our lesson begins following the
completion of those steps, meaning this is where
we get into processing the flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'll do my best for my precious flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is the solution that keeps the flowers looking
beautiful... I need to be very careful with it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Warm it up in the microwave to body
temperature...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOM!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Th-the solution exploded everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww, I have to remake the whole thing again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My pretty, pretty flowers, stay beautiful and fair!
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It looks like you're casting a spell on them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? R-really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My pretty, pretty flowers, stay beautiful and fair!
Be bright, shiny, and cuter than I can bear!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I did it!

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Great job! Now you should take them home and
leave them to dry for two days.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Now I can keep my flowers looking gorgeous!
choice_data_list: I'd love to see them when they're done!

You must be excited to do this yourself next
time!

You must be excited to do this yourself next
time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Now I can keep my flowers looking gorgeous!
choice_data_list: I'd love to see them when they're done!

You must be excited to do this yourself next
time!

You must be excited to do this yourself next
time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I'll try my best to preserve them
perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'd love for you to see them too, Rob Roy. My
flowers and I are in your debt, after all...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I'm looking forward to seeing the
lasting beauty of your magical flowers.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Rob Roy. Let's decorate our room with
them when they're done!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've gotta make sure I review what we did
today when I get home so I don't forget!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'll help out too! I really think I've got the knack
now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rob Roy! I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she pictures her flowers, a smile full of hope
and kindness spreads across Rice Shower's face.
